SessionStart.command: grep -q '^\.env' .gitignore 2>/dev/null && echo '[CAPEGIS] ok .env is gitignored' >&2 || echo '[CAPEGIS] WARN: .env may not be gitignored - check .gitignore' >&2; [ -f PLAN.md ] && echo '[CAPEGIS] ok PLAN.md found' >&2 || echo '[CAPEGIS] WARN: PLAN.md missing' >&2; MILESTONE=$(grep -m1 'CURRENT_PHASE\|Last milestone\|## M[0-9]' PLAN.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); echo "[CAPEGIS] Milestone: ${MILESTONE:-unknown}" >&2

PreToolUse.command: FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_FILE:-}}"; if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) LINES=$(wc -l < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$LINES" -gt 300 ] && echo "[CAPEGIS] ✗ WARN: $FILE already has $LINES lines (limit 300, CLAUDE.md Rule 7)" >&2 || true ;; *migrations*|supabase/migrations/*.sql) BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE"); echo "$BASENAME" | grep -qE '^[0-9]{14}_' || echo "[CAPEGIS] ✗ WARN: Migration filename '$BASENAME' does not match YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_ convention" >&2 ;; esac; fi

FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_FILE:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-}"; if [ -n "$CONTENT" ]; then echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '(eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}[.][A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|service_role[^=]*=ey|https://[a-z0-9]{20,}[.]supabase[.]co)' && echo '[CAPEGIS] BLOCK: Potential hardcoded API key detected. Use environment variables only (CLAUDE.md Rule 3).' >&2 || true; fi

PostToolUse.command: LEAKED=$(git grep -E '(supabase[.]co|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\s*=\s*[a-z])' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.env' -l 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$LEAKED" ]; then echo '[CAPEGIS] SECRET LEAK detected in:' >&2; echo "$LEAKED" | sed 's/^/  /' >&2; else echo '[CAPEGIS] ok No secret leaks found in tracked source files' >&2; fi

FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_FILE:-}}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(sql)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'migration'; then grep -qi 'CREATE TABLE' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && { grep -qi 'ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY' "$FILE" || echo "[CAPEGIS] WARN: Migration '$FILE' has CREATE TABLE but no ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY (CLAUDE.md Rule 4)" >&2; } || true; fi

FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_FILE:-}}"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '^(docs|\.claude|\.gemini|\.github)/' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(^|/)(INDEX\.md|CHANGELOG_AUTO\.md)$'; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); python3 "$ROOT/scripts/sync_doc_indexes.py" --changed "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "[CAPEGIS] WARN: auto-doc sync failed for $FILE" >&2; fi

Stop.command: PLAN_CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'PLAN.md' || echo 0); [ "$PLAN_CHANGED" -gt 0 ] && echo '[CAPEGIS] ok PLAN.md has uncommitted changes (remember to commit)' >&2 || echo '[CAPEGIS] info PLAN.md unchanged this session' >&2; DIRTY=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$DIRTY" ]; then echo '[CAPEGIS] Uncommitted tracked changes:' >&2; echo "$DIRTY" | sed 's/^/  /' >&2; else echo '[CAPEGIS] ok No uncommitted tracked changes' >&2; fi
